mapper.select:
SELECT id, reimbursement_no AS reimbursementNo, CASE document_status WHEN 0 THEN '草稿' WHEN 1 THEN '已完成' WHEN 2 THEN '已作废' ELSE '' END AS documentStatus, document_type AS documentType, reimburser_name AS reimburserName, reim_department_name AS reimDepartmentName, reim_company_name AS reimCompanyName, business_type_name AS businessTypeName, reimbursement_title AS reimbursementTitle, reimbursement_reason AS reimbursementReason, subsidy_total AS subsidyTotal, create_time AS createTime, remarks FROM fk_reim_main
AND reimbursement_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.reimburseNo}, '%')
AND reimbursement_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.reimburseTitle}, '%')
AND reimbursement_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.reimburseReason}, '%')
AND reim_company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.expenseBelongCompName}, '%')
AND reim_department_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.reimburseDeptName}, '%')
AND reimburser_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.reimburseUserName}, '%')
AND business_type_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.businessTypeName}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
